HEADER.SUBTITLE: Digital Solution Navigator
HEADER.TITLE:
There are many paths to digital,
which one fits your current stage?
HEADER.DESC: Before investing budget, we want you to understand the market options. There is no best tool, only the strategy that best fits your current needs.

DIY.TITLE: No-Code Platforms
DIY.SCENARIO: Validating Business Ideas (MVP), Personal Portfolios, Standard E-commerce.
DIY.COST: Functionality limited by platform, data hard to migrate. You act as Designer & PM.
DIY.ADVICE: Expert Advice: A great start! If budget is tight and time allows, try Wix first. Come to us for a system upgrade when business logic gets complex.

AI.TITLE: AI Assisted Generation
AI.SCENARIO: Rapid Prototyping, One-off Internal Tools, Single Function Scripts.
AI.COST: Generated code lacks architectural structure. Hard to debug as system grows, plus security concerns.
AI.ADVICE: Expert Advice: AI is a great accelerator! We use it too. But you need a senior architect to review AI code to ensure the system won't crash under load.

ENT.TITLE: Professional Architecture
ENT.SCENARIO: Core Business Systems, High Concurrency Platforms, Long-term Digital Assets.

PROCESS.TITLE: When templates fail and AI can't solve logic...
PROCESS.DESC:
This is where we step in. We don't just provide code, we provide a battle-tested system craftsmanship.
Here is the standard Tiger Digital process:

STEP1.TITLE: Business Logic & Blueprint Design
STEP1.SUBTITLE: Blueprint & Architecture
STEP1.DESC: Most projects fail from "building without thinking". We introduce DDD (Domain-Driven Design) to break complex business into clear data models and user journeys.

STEP2.TITLE: Modern Core Development
STEP2.SUBTITLE: Modern Engineering
STEP2.DESC: Reject spaghetti code. Adopting Angular + Go strong typing architecture combined with AI Copilot. This means bank-grade stability with startup speed.

STEP3.TITLE: AI Automation & Workflow
STEP3.SUBTITLE: AI-Powered Workflow
STEP3.DESC: Go-live is just the start. We integrate n8n and LLM to turn your system into a "thinking" automation hub.

CTA.TITLE: Ready to upgrade your Business Engine?
CTA.DESC: Don't let old processes drag you down. Spend 1 minute to fill out requirements for a free architecture assessment.
CTA.NOTE: * Current Schedule: Consultations available starting next week

CARD1.TITLE: Digital Transformation
CARD1.DESC: Say goodbye to Excel chaos. Tailor-made internal systems to automate tedious processes.

CARD2.TITLE: Web Application Development
CARD2.DESC: Building high-security, high-concurrency enterprise applications. Ensuring stability and scalability.

CARD3.TITLE: Tech Consulting & Mentoring
CARD3.DESC: Passing down battle-tested experience from non-CS to senior. Grounded career advice and technical guidance.

FOOTER.SLOGAN:
Digital Simplicity. Business Agility.
Building strong digital moats for enterprises,
Guiding clear career paths for engineers.

SUMMARY.TITLE: Personal Profile
SUMMARY.TEXT: Software Engineer with 3+ years of experience across full-stack development, containerized infrastructure, and system integration. Currently serving as Software Engineer Lead at Foxconn India, built and led an 8-person engineering team and building platform infrastructure under strict client security policies. Hands-on experience deploying AI Agents on Kubernetes (K3s), designing polyglot microservices architecture, and building CI/CD pipelines for restricted network environments. Familiar with Python (FastAPI), Prompt Engineering, and MCP/Agent architecture design for AI service integration.

FOXCONN.DESC: Built and led a local engineering team (6 members) to establish platform infrastructure from scratch for tier-1 consumer electronics product line. Serving as technical bridge between India operations and China development team.
POINTS: Platform Delivery: Built containerized deployment platform with Traefik reverse proxy, Docker Compose orchestration, and GitLab CI/CD pipeline with Nexus private registry for restricted network environment. Reduced deployment time from days to hours.

Observability Tooling: Developed custom database monitoring agent in Go — exports metrics to Prometheus, pushes backup status via Prometheus Pushgateway, and visualizes all data through Grafana dashboards for real-time database health monitoring.

GitOps MVP: Built end-to-end GitOps pipeline with ArgoCD, K3s, ConfigMap-driven configuration, and frontend deployment — validating the full declarative deployment workflow from Git commit to running service.

System Migration & Knowledge Transfer: Onboarded 3 production systems from China. Built AI-powered knowledge base from fragmented docs. Established SOPs and delegated daily operations to reduce single-person dependency.

Architecture Design: Evaluated and selected technology stack across backend platform (three approaches compared, Docker Compose adopted for team readiness) and frontend framework (React selected after three-round evaluation). Produced documented trade-off analysis for each decision including future K8s migration roadmap with Kong, Kuma, and MCP-based AI integration layer.
Participated in weekly DCSA standards meetings with the world’s 9 largest ocean carriers (75% of global container trade). Contributed multi-carrier integration insights to API specification.
Developed Developer Portal for enterprise customers (IKEA, Volvo) to self-service integrate shipping APIs.

ADVANTECH.DESC: Joined as junior. Led monolith-to-microservices migration and built multi-carrier logistics platform.
POINTS: Monolith → Microservices: Decomposed VB.NET into .NET Core microservices (ABP.IO DDD). Deployment cycle: weeks → days.
Multi-Carrier Integration: Unified DHL, FedEx, Taiwan carriers into single interface (factory/strategy patterns, retry mechanisms). Manual label creation reduced 30%.
Chatbot Integration: Integrated logistics carrier APIs with chatbot interface, enabling automated shipping inquiries and order tracking through conversational interaction.
Warehouse Automation: PWA for PDA — barcode scanning, auto label printing, e-signatures, dashboards.
Data Migration: MS SQL → MongoDB with hierarchical docs and region-based sharding. API response +40%.

AI_AGENT.TITLE: AI Agent on Kubernetes | Personal Lab Project
POINTS: Deployed OpenClaw (computer-use AI agent) on K3s cluster — handled containerization, Kubernetes deployment configuration, and runtime troubleshooting for AI workload.
Built Agent Skill Registry for managing and registering AI agent capabilities, tested with OpenClaw deployment. Source code available on GitHub.
